description: Cryptocurrency price quotation tool using DIA API. Returns real-time prices for 3000+ tokens by symbol, name, or currency pair.

capabilities.name: tool.crypto.quote
capabilities.description: Get current cryptocurrency price quotation. Accepts currency pairs (BTC/USD), coin names (Solana), or symbols (ETH).

query.description: Currency pair (e.g. BTC/USD), coin name (e.g. Solana), or symbol (e.g. ETH)
